claim_boundary: V1.2 remained preproduction and no remote training or formal OOF collection was launched from it.
reason: V1.2 collector did not independently require and hash-validate the frozen governance amendment.
V1.2 freeze validation did not close governance.path and governance.sha256 to the supplied amendment.
V1.2 collector did not close result, seal and contract binding hashes to each other and to its exact implementation freeze SHA.
